# C90
**The Limitative Inversion: completeness ⇒ Φ → 0 ⇒ collapse is the value-sign reversal of completeness ⇒ inconsistency ⇒ collapse; the unreconstructable remainder is load-bearing. C17 stated in limitative terms.**

*Confidence:* ~90% as observation · *Status:* observation · registered Run 8, 2026-06-28 · no reduction claimed · *Register:* core
*Home:* limitative-theorems-and-privacy-is-value.md §1, §4

Band IX · The Limitative Reading · registered Run 8, 2026-06-28 (Gate G6)
